generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values both security and personal freedom, I've been following the recent debates on expanding domestic security powers. While some worry about overreach, it's important to remember that our intelligence agencies have prevented numerous threats we never even heard about. In today's complex world, we can't afford to weaken our defenses. Let's support measured, responsible expansion of powers to keep us all safe. #NationalSecurity #BalancedApproach
